endo.query: (root canal OR endodontic OR pulp capping)

perio.query: (periodontitis OR scaling root planing OR keratinized mucosa)

plaque.query: ("dental plaque"[tiab] OR "dental biofilm"[tiab] OR "supragingival plaque"[tiab] OR "plaque control"[tiab] OR "plaque index"[tiab])

toothpick-method.query: ("toothpick method"[tiab] OR "Watanabe method"[tiab] OR "toothpick technique"[tiab]) AND (toothbrush*[tiab] OR toothbrushing[tiab] OR plaque[tiab] OR gingiv*[tiab] OR periodont*[tiab] OR "oral hygiene"[tiab] OR dental[tiab] OR "peri-implant"[tiab])
